expectations.evidence: Section header 'CODEMAPS/HUMANMAPS 발견' and detailed descriptions of both: CODEMAPS as English Markdown for AI agents, HUMANMAPS as Korean HTML for humans.
Workflow step 1: 'detect_changes.mjs 실행 — SHA256 기반 변경 감지' and step 2: 'extract_structure.mjs 실행 — Next.js 라우트/Prisma 스키마 사전 추출'.
States '서비스 루트(app/, apps/, src/, pages/) 없음' and 'detect_changes.mjs는 no_service_dirs_found 결과를 반환할 것', demonstrating understanding of service root detection.

eval_feedback.overall: Solid result. Even without the skill, the agent discovered the doc-update system through project exploration and correctly identified all three key aspects. Output is more concise than the with_skill variant but covers all assertions.
